title: Katya Adler: Jubilation in Budapest will be felt in Europe but leaves Moscow cold
summary_full: European leaders share Hungarians' joy over the ousting of Vladimir Putin's EU ally, writes the BBC's Europe editor.
summary_public: European leaders share Hungarians' joy over the ousting of Vladimir Putin's EU ally, writes the BBC's Europe editor.

HU.label: positive
HU.evidence: Jubilation in Budapest will be felt in Europe
